title: Glimpse Beyond
description: ALL players add 3 [gold]Souls[/gold] into their [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
upgraded_description: ALL players add 4 [gold]Souls[/gold] into their [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
notes: Multiplayer Only: This card can only be played in multiplayer games. Generates Soul cards for all players on your team.
